summary: Implements MessageSummaryRepository with upsert semantics and cross-table JOIN queries to identify unsummarized messages

guarantees: Create is an upsert: duplicate message_id updates summary/model/created_at and returns the existing row's ID
GetByMessageID returns (nil, nil) when not found
GetUnsummarizedMessagesByChannels delegates to GetUnsummarizedMessages when channelIDs is nil or empty

effects: SQLite reads and writes on message_summaries table; reads messages table via JOIN

observations.text: Create uses ON CONFLICT(message_id) DO UPDATE — re-summarizing a message overwrites the previous result including model name. The original ID is preserved (not regenerated).
GetUnsummarizedMessagesByChannels builds a dynamic IN clause with placeholder strings; SQL injection is not possible because channelIDs are int64 values appended as bound parameters.
GetByChannelAndDate and GetUnsummarizedMessages both JOIN messages to filter by channel/date — the message_summaries table does not redundantly store channel or date.
